mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort),-1)+1 FROM diary_media WHERE diary_id=#{diaryId}
SELECT * FROM media_asset WHERE public_id=#{publicId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM media_asset WHERE asset_id=#{assetId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT dm.diary_id,a.*,dm.sort FROM diary_media dm INNER JOIN media_asset a ON a.asset_id=dm.asset_id WHERE dm.diary_id=#{diaryId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dm.sort, a.asset_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diary_media dm INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id=dm.diary_id WHERE dm.asset_id=#{assetId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.visibility='SHARED' AND d.locked=0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diary_media dm INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id=dm.diary_id WHERE dm.asset_id=#{assetId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.locked=1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diary_media WHERE asset_id=#{assetId}
SELECT * FROM media_asset WHERE status='PROCESSING' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE media_asset SET status=#{status},thumbnail_key=#{thumbnailKey},poster_key=#{posterKey}, waveform_key=#{waveformKey},transcoded_key=#{transcodedKey},duration_seconds=#{durationSeconds}, width=#{width},height=#{height},ocr_text=#{ocrText},processing_error=#{processingError} WHERE asset_id=#{assetId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE media_asset SET caption=#{caption},location_name=#{locationName},latitude=#{latitude},longitude=#{longitude} WHERE asset_id=#{assetId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT used_bytes FROM space_storage_usage WHERE space_id=#{spaceId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT storage_quota_bytes FROM diary_space WHERE space_id=#{spaceId}
mapper.update: UPDATE media_asset SET deleted_at=NOW() WHERE asset_id=#{assetId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
